day5_morning_start_2.name: 私
day5_morning_start_2.text: *窓の外を見る。空が灰色だ。雨が降りそうだ。*

day5_morning_start_3.name: 私
day5_morning_start_3.text: *……行こう。今日中に終わらせる。*

day5_morning_start_4.name: 私
day5_morning_start_4.text: *I look out the window. The sky is gray. Clouds hang low. It looks like rain.*

day5_morning_start_5.name: 私
day5_morning_start_5.text: *...Day 1 morning was clear. Cherry blossoms were in bloom. In just four days, the world has changed this much.*

day5_morning_start_6.name: 私
day5_morning_start_6.text: *No. The world hasn't changed. It's the way I see it that has changed.*

day5_morning_start_7.name: 私
day5_morning_start_7.text: *I checked my bag. The things I packed last night. My phone with the evidence. Yuna's memory card. The photo fragment.*

day5_morning_start_8.name: 私
day5_morning_start_8.text: *...I have to get out today. Before 11 PM tonight.*

day5_morning_start_9.name: 私
day5_morning_start_9.text: *I put on my uniform. My face in the mirror... is not the face from Day 1. My eyes are different. Eyes that have learned what fear looks like.*

day5_morning_gate.name: 私
day5_morning_gate.text: *学校の正門。鎖が巻かれている。正門以外の出口は……すべて塞がれている。*

day5_morning_gate_2.name: 私
day5_morning_gate_2.text: *生徒たちが何事もないかのように正門を通り過ぎていく。まるで……見えていないかのように。*

day5_morning_gate_3.name: 私
day5_morning_gate_3.text: *三人が正門の前に並んで立っている。*

day5_morning_gate_4.name: 私
day5_morning_gate_4.text: *The front gate is open. Same as always. Students pass through in small groups.*

day5_morning_gate_5.name: 私
day5_morning_gate_5.text: *...I just have to go out. Past the front gate, turn left, and the bus stop is there. Get on any bus.*

day5_morning_gate_6.name: 私
day5_morning_gate_6.text: *I took one step forward. Two steps. The gate gets closer.*

day5_morning_paralysis_1.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_1.text: *...On the third step, my legs stopped.*

day5_morning_paralysis_2.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_2.text: *They won't move. I have the will to walk, but my legs won't listen. As if they've been embedded in concrete.*

day5_morning_paralysis_3.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_3.text: *The tea I drank last night. The 'good for sleep' tea that Nurse Riin gave me. ...Could it be?*

day5_morning_paralysis_4.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_4.text: *I look around. Students pass through the gate. Casually. Smiling.*

day5_morning_paralysis_5.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_5.text: *Only I can't move. The gate is open. Nobody is blocking me.*

day5_morning_paralysis_6.name: 私
day5_morning_paralysis_6.text: *Standing in front of an open door and I can't take a single step out. This... this is the school's real prison.*

day5_morning_watchers_2.name: 私
day5_morning_watchers_2.text: *Inside the school gate. Ms. Eunsu is sitting on a bench. Sea is standing under a tree. Nurse Riin is looking down from the nurse's office window.*

day5_morning_watchers_3.name: 私
day5_morning_watchers_3.text: *All in different positions. A natural-looking scene. But all three are watching me.*

day5_morning_welcome.name: 担任教師
day5_morning_welcome.text: "おはよう、{name}。今日は特別な日よ。"

day5_morning_welcome_2.name: ハン・セア
day5_morning_welcome_2.text: "{name}！ 今日は一日中一緒にいよう。"

day5_morning_welcome_3.name: 保健教師
day5_morning_welcome_3.text: "今日、健康診断の仕上げをしないとね。放課後に必ず保健室に来てね。"

day5_morning_welcome_4.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_4.text: *三人の微笑みが重なって見える。同じ微笑み。……狩人の微笑み。*

day5_morning_welcome_5.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_5.text: *Sea takes my arm. Naturally. Her grip is strong.*

day5_morning_welcome_6.name: ハン・セア
day5_morning_welcome_6.text: "Let's stay together all day today. Let's never separate."

day5_morning_welcome_8.name: カン・リイン
day5_morning_welcome_8.text: "There's still the health checkup to finish."

day5_morning_welcome_9.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_9.text: *Nurse Riin smiles. Her hand is in her coat pocket. Something bulges inside the pocket.*

day5_morning_welcome_10.name: カン・リイン
day5_morning_welcome_10.text: "Come to the nurse's office after school. ...Be sure to come."

day5_morning_welcome_11.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_11.text: *The three smiles overlap before my eyes.*

day5_morning_welcome_12.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_12.text: *The same smile. The same angle. The same depth. The same warmth.*

day5_morning_welcome_14.name: 私
day5_morning_welcome_14.text: *And I am the prey. Already inside the cage.*

day5_morning_classroom.name: 私
day5_morning_classroom.text: *教室。黒板に文字が書いてある。*

day5_morning_classroom_2.name: 私
day5_morning_classroom_2.text: *『卒業式』と書いてある。……卒業式？ まだ5日目なのに？*

day5_morning_classroom_4.name: 私
day5_morning_classroom_4.text: *...Graduation ceremony? Only five days since I transferred? What graduation?*

day5_morning_classroom_5.name: 私
day5_morning_classroom_5.text: *I sat down. Sea sits next to me. Not her usual seat. She dragged a chair right up beside me.*

day5_morning_classroom_6.name: 私
day5_morning_classroom_6.text: *Ms. Eunsu stands at the podium. She doesn't call roll. She starts talking right away.*

day5_morning_class.name: 担任教師
day5_morning_class.text: "今日は特別な授業よ。『卒業』について話してみましょうか。"

day5_morning_class_2.name: 担任教師
day5_morning_class_2.text: "卒業とは一つの過程の終わりよ。過程を終えれば……新しい場所へ行くことになるの。"

day5_morning_class_4.name: 担任教師
day5_morning_class_4.text: "みんなも知っての通り、学校の外はとても冷たくて危険な場所でしょう。傷ついて、失敗して、折れて……"

day5_morning_class_5.name: パク・ウンス
day5_morning_class_5.text: "That's why your teacher wants you to 'graduate' in the safest and most pristine state possible."

day5_morning_class_6.name: 私
day5_morning_class_6.text: *The teacher turns around. She looks at me. Only me.*

day5_morning_class_7.name: パク・ウンス
day5_morning_class_7.text: "Some students take three years to realize that, but our class is very special..."

day5_morning_class_9.name: 私
day5_morning_class_9.text: *The classroom goes quiet. You can't even hear breathing.*

day5_morning_class_11.name: 私
day5_morning_class_11.text: *The teacher smiles. Warmly. As if in congratulation.*

day5_morning_class_12.name: 私
day5_morning_class_12.text: *...Every other student in the classroom is staring at me. Thirty faces. Nobody moves.*

day5_morning_class_13.name: 私
day5_morning_class_13.text: *It seems like nobody is breathing. Like mannequins. Like dolls.*

day5_morning_class_14.name: 私
day5_morning_class_14.text: *Sea takes my hand. Tight. My fingers hurt.*

day5_morning_class_15.name: 私
day5_morning_class_15.text: *I have to get out of this classroom. I have to hold on until lunch. That's when I move.*

day5_morning_note.name: 私
day5_morning_note.text: *机の裏にメモが貼ってある。ユナの字だ。*

day5_morning_note_2.name: 私
day5_morning_note_2.text: *『昼休みに旧館3階。脱出ルートを見つけたよ。— ユナ』*

day5_morning_note_3.name: 私
day5_morning_note_3.text: *'Lunch — end corridor, 3rd floor, old building. There's an emergency exit. The route Seolhwa-sunbae found. I found the escape route. — Yuna'*

day5_morning_note_4.name: 私
day5_morning_note_4.text: *The route Seolhwa found. The very route Seolhwa told me about in last night's dream.*

day5_morning_note_5.name: 私
day5_morning_note_5.text: *How did Yuna know this? ...Did Yuna also meet Seolhwa?*

day5_morning_note_6.name: 私
day5_morning_note_6.text: *I put the note in my pocket. My heart beats. I feel something called hope again for the first time in four days.*

day5_morning_no_note.name: 私
day5_morning_no_note.text: *Class ended. I have to find a way to escape on my own. There might be an emergency exit on the old building side...*

day5_morning_end.name: 私
day5_morning_end.text: *午前が終わった。時計が止まったかのように遅い。*
